queries.question: For each frequent flyer program, could you provide the corresponding benefit descriptions?
queries.sql: select frequent_flyer_program.programid , benefits.description from Frequent_Flyer_Program_Benefits join Benefits on Frequent_Flyer_Program_Benefits.BenefitId = Benefits.BenefitId join Frequent_Flyer_Program on Frequent_Flyer_Program_Benefits.ProgramId = Frequent_Flyer_Program.ProgramId
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?programid ?description WHERE {
  ?frequent_flyer_program_benefits a :Frequent_Flyer_Program_Benefits .
  ?benefits a :Benefits .
  ?frequent_flyer_program_benefits p:hasBenefits ?benefits .
  ?frequent_flyer_program a :Frequent_Flyer_Program .
  ?frequent_flyer_program_benefits p:hasFrequent_Flyer_Program ?frequent_flyer_program .
  ?frequent_flyer_program p:ProgramId ?programid .
  ?benefits p:Description ?description .
}

queries.question: What benefits descriptions are associated with each frequent flyer program?
queries.sql: SELECT Benefits.Description  from Frequent_Flyer_Program_Benefits join Benefits on Frequent_Flyer_Program_Benefits.BenefitId = Benefits.BenefitId join Frequent_Flyer_Program on Frequent_Flyer_Program_Benefits.ProgramId = Frequent_Flyer_Program.ProgramId   GROUP BY Frequent_Flyer_Program_Benefits.BenefitId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Frequent_Flyer_Program_Benefits.ProgramId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Frequent_Flyer_Program)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What benefits descriptions are associated with each frequent flyer program?
